message:
chore(deps): Major dependency refresh across workspace crates

Comprehensive dependency update bringing all workspace crates to current
versions. Includes Tokio, serde, and async runtime ecosystem updates.

- Update Cargo.lock with refreshed dependency tree (+1100 LOC changes)
- Bump workspace member versions (rch, rchd, rch-common, rch-telemetry)
- Document all changes in UPGRADE_LOG.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
